title: New office, new shelves
body: Finally got the new succulent shelves set up in my new office! Here's how they look and the current size of the collection — we still have two whole new shelves to grow the collection out. I'm excited :).
Looking forward to these guys actually getting enough light and hopefully soon getting to repot some of them out of their original nursery pots. And I might get to go succulent shopping this weekend!

shots.cap: The new shelf wall — three lit shelves in, two to grow into.
Echeveria blushing at the leaf tips.
